description: Wave 2 Item 9 — audit trail dashboards for SEBI-grade reconstruction. 6 tables: phase2_audit, depth_rebalance_audit, ws_reconnect_audit, boot_audit, selftest_audit, order_audit. Retention: 90d hot in QuestDB, then S3 Intelligent-Tiering then Glacier per deploy/aws/s3-lifecycle-audit-tables.json. Runbook: .claude/rules/project/wave-2-error-codes.md.
title: tickvault — Audit Trail (Wave 2)

targets.rawSql: SELECT outcome AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM phase2_audit WHERE ts >= dateadd('h', -24, now()) GROUP BY outcome
SELECT ts, underlying_symbol, old_atm_strike, new_atm_strike, swap_levels, outcome FROM depth_rebalance_audit WHERE ts >= dateadd('h', -6, now()) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT feed AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM ws_reconnect_audit WHERE ts >= dateadd('h', -24, now()) GROUP BY feed
SELECT ts, boot_id, step, outcome, elapsed_ms, detail FROM boot_audit WHERE boot_id = (SELECT boot_id FROM boot_audit ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY ts ASC
SELECT ts AS time, check_name AS metric, duration_ms AS value FROM selftest_audit WHERE ts >= dateadd('h', -24, now()) ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT ts, order_id, correlation_id, leg, event, security_id, segment, transaction_type, quantity, price, order_status, outcome FROM order_audit WHERE ts >= dateadd('h', -24, now()) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Audit write failures today (sum across 6 tables)
